name: ContextAI (RAG System)
desc: A GenAI application that processes PDFs into vector embeddings and enables context-aware question answering using LLMs and RAG. Built using FastAPI, LangChain, and ChromaDB.

name: NextHire AI
desc: An AI-powered system that analyzes resumes, detects skill gaps, and generates personalized interview questions and ATS-optimized resumes using LLMs.

name: LMS Backend System
desc: A scalable backend system with authentication, course management, and payment integration using Node.js, Express, MongoDB, JWT, and REST APIs.

name: CareSync (Healthcare Platform)
desc: A full-stack healthcare platform for patients and doctors with real-time dashboards, appointment scheduling, and AI-powered health insights.

name: TeamSync (Project Management)
desc: A comprehensive team and project management system with role-based access, real-time dashboards, and task tracking. Built with React, Tailwind CSS, and Node.js.
